title: Objects, Prototypes, Properties, and Data Shape · Language Lens: Property Descriptors
summary: Model service records and shared behavior while defending against accidental mutation and unsafe property input. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js property descriptors increment in a validated service-record domain model. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use data or accessor descriptors and explain writable, enumerable, and configurable constraints.
Trace property lookup and method sharing through the prototype chain without class-only mental models.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
